prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年理科（物理类）最低位次分别为约5602名、4984名、5570名、4325名、4507名，整体呈波动走势；2024年位次明显前移至4325名，2025年小幅后移至 4507名，近两年基准位次在4300–4500名区间；该校在青海省理科（物理类）招生计划2021–2023年均为10人，2024–2025年缩减至7人；2026年大幅扩 招至16人，较2025年增加约129%，扩招幅度显著，预计将明显拉低录取门槛。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 太原理工大学为211工程、双一流建设高校；软科中国大学排名持续上升，2021年 第113名→2026年第97名，近年排名稳步提升，反映学校综合实力增强，对考生吸引力有所增加；2022年高考周期内曾出现偏负面声誉（郑强书记管理受批评）， 但近年无重大负面舆情；抖音综合热度排名第63位，评价为"一般"，短视频平台曝光量中等，未出现明显报考关注升温信号；第五轮学科评估中化学工程与技术 获评A-，为该校唯一A-及以上学科；招生专业中过程装备与控制工程、冶金工程等与化工学科关联，但传统工科整体社会热度偏冷。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 机械/智能制造类专 业2024年评估为"分化观望"，传统工科热度一般；冶金工程、采矿工程等属"生化环材"大类，社会舆论偏劝退。青海省2026年普通高考总人数约48000人，按近年物理类占比估算 约30670人，与2025年物理类30457人基本持平，考生规模未出现明显变化；2026年。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合历年位次波动、2026年招生计划大幅扩招 （7人→16人）是影响位次的最关键因素，预计将显著拉低录取门槛；但学校软科排名持续上升（113→97）及211身份对考生仍有吸引力，可在一定程度上抵消扩招带来的位次后移 幅度。在2025年基准4507名基础上，经供需弹性计算并综合修正后，预测2026年最低位次约7783名，区间7283–8283名。

major_tier_recommendation.tier_1:
一档（最难进）
- 机械设计制造及其自动化
- 机械电子工程。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_2:
二档（中等）
- 过程装备与控制工程
- 智能制造工程（2026年新增）。
major_tier_recommendation.tier_3:
三档（相对好进）
- 冶金工程
- 航空航天工程（2026年新增）
- 采矿工程（近年未招生，参考历史）。
major_tier_recommendation.overall_advice: 2026年大幅扩招后预测位次约7783名，区间7283–8283名。建议位次在区间中上段（约7500名以内）的考生以二档专业为主、一档专业冲刺；位次在区间中下段（约7500名以外） 的考生以三档专业保底、二档专业为主；一档专业竞争仍较激烈，建议位次明显优于区间上限（约7200名以内）再重点冲刺。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum rankings for science (physics category) were approximately 5602, 4984, 5570, 4325, and 4507 respectively, showing a fluctuating trend; in 2024, the ranking significantly moved forward to 4325, and in 2025, it slightly moved back to 4507, with the baseline ranking in the range of 4300–4500 in recent two years; the enrollment plan for science (physics category) in Qinghai Province was 10 students from 2021 to 2023, reduced to 7 students in 2024–2025; in 2026, it will significantly expand to 16 students, an increase of about 129% compared to 2025, with a notable expansion magnitude, which is expected to significantly lower the admission threshold.

学校层次与声誉.title: University Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: Taiyuan University of Technology is a 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; its ranking in the Soft Science China University Rankings has been steadily rising, from 113th in 2021 to 97th in 2026, reflecting the enhancement of the university's comprehensive strength and increased attractiveness to candidates; during the 2022 college entrance examination cycle, there was some negative reputation (criticism of Secretary Zheng Qiang's management), but no major negative public opinion in recent years; the comprehensive popularity ranking on Douyin is 63rd, rated as 'average', with moderate exposure on short video platforms, showing no obvious signs of increased application attention; in the fifth round of discipline evaluation, Chemical Engineering and Technology was rated A-, the only A- or above discipline at the university; among the enrollment majors, Process Equipment and Control Engineering, Metallurgical Engineering, etc., are related to chemical engineering disciplines, but traditional engineering fields are generally less popular in society.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Mechanical/Intelligent Manufacturing majors were assessed as 'differentiated and wait-and-see' in 2024, with traditional engineering fields having average popularity; Metallurgical Engineering, Mining Engineering, etc., belong to the 'biology, chemistry, environment, materials' category, with social opinion leaning towards discouragement. The total number of candidates for the 2026 Qinghai Province general college entrance examination is about 48,000, estimated to be about 30,670 for the physics category based on recent proportions, basically unchanged from the 30,457 physics category candidates in 2025, with no significant change in candidate scale; 2026.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the historical ranking fluctuations and the significant expansion of the 2026 enrollment plan (7→16 students) as the most critical factor affecting rankings, it is expected to significantly lower the admission threshold; however, the continuous rise in the Soft Science ranking (113→97) and the 211 status still attract candidates, which can offset the ranking decline caused by expansion to some extent. Based on the 2025 baseline of 4507, after supply-demand elasticity calculation and comprehensive correction, the predicted minimum ranking for 2026 is about 7783, with a range of 7283–8283.

major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_1:
Tier 1 (Hardest to Enter)
- Mechanical Design, Manufacturing and Automation
- Mechanical and Electronic Engineering.
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_2:
Tier 2 (Medium)
- Process Equipment and Control Engineering
- Intelligent Manufacturing Engineering (new in 2026).
major_tier_recommendation_en.tier_3:
Tier 3 (Relatively Easy to Enter)
- Metallurgical Engineering
- Aerospace Engineering (new in 2026)
- Mining Engineering (not enrolled in recent years, refer to history).
major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: After the significant expansion in 2026, the predicted ranking is about 7783, with a range of 7283–8283. It is recommended that candidates with rankings in the upper-middle part of the range (approximately within 7500) focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice and sprint for Tier 1 majors; candidates with rankings in the lower-middle part of the range (approximately outside 7500) use Tier 3 majors as a safety net and Tier 2 majors as the main choice; competition for Tier 1 majors remains intense, so it is recommended that candidates with rankings significantly better than the upper limit of the range (approximately within 7200) focus on sprinting for them.
